responsive_tree_output.summary: Preserve shared headline content while routing the visual/card cluster into a responsive-specific tree plan.

display_rules.reason: Shared heading remains active across viewports.
Desktop connector geometry is not portable to mobile.
Responsive feature list replaces the desktop visual cluster.

display_contract.content_policy: Shared content remains single-source where possible.
display_contract.sync_policy: Feature labels in the mobile list must match the desktop feature labels.

steps.action: Keep the desktop visual cluster active only for desktop.
Create a compact responsive feature list using the same feature labels.
steps.expected_result: Mobile content is readable without forcing desktop connector geometry.

required_checks: Confirm shared heading appears once per viewport.
Confirm desktop visual cluster is not visible on mobile.
Confirm mobile feature list preserves all meaningful feature labels.
validation_plan.claim_boundary: This is a hybrid handoff plan, not live render validation.

final_review.reason: Hybrid route includes shared, desktop-only, and responsive-specific ownership, but tablet connector simplification remains unresolved.

unresolved_unknowns: Confirm whether decorative connector lines should be hidden or simplified on tablet.
